form.formComment: Beaten favourite last start when second at this track on March 27. Scored the start before at this track on March 20. Rates highly. Classy filly who should get every chance from this draw.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Miss Leopatra at this track over 1730m in a 3yo No NR F on March 27 at $16. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing second after showing early speed, behind Trixie Dora at this track over 2130m in a 3yo No NR on April 3 at $7.50. Rates highly. Fitter again and has a nice draw so can figure.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr3) over 1730m at this track beaten 20 m by Miss Leopatra (2:04.00) in 3yo No NR F on March 27 at $31. Two runs back 2nd (Fr7) over 1684m after racing wide at Pinjarra beaten a head by Trixie Dora (2:01.70) in 3yo 0-2 WINs F on March 9 at $15. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

form.formComment: Resuming after six-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into sixth after showing early speed, behind D Mac at this track over 2130m in a 2yo G1 No NR on September 26 at $5. One of last season's top juveniles who is a big chance for a winning return.

form.formComment: Resumes today. His previous first-up run was successful when he won by 12 m as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr7) held up early, at this track (2:36.30) beating Last King Of Capel in 2yo MAIDEN on September 30 at $1.28. Will be better for this run and happy to watch this time.
